title: AUTO CDC flows for streaming tables in Databricks SQL are generally available ​
body:
**June 15, 2026**

The `FLOW AUTO CDC` clause for [CREATE STREAMING TABLE](/aws/en/sql/language-manual/sql-ref-syntax-ddl-create-streaming-table) in Databricks SQL is now generally available. Use `AUTO CDC` to process change data capture (CDC) records from a source into a streaming table, automatically handling out-of-order records as SCD type 1 or SCD type 2 without the complex logic that `MERGE INTO` requires. See [CREATE STREAMING TABLE ... FLOW AUTO CDC](/aws/en/sql/language-manual/sql-ref-syntax-ddl-create-streaming-table-auto-cdc), [generally available](/aws/en/release-notes/release-types).

ref_links.text: CREATE STREAMING TABLE ... FLOW AUTO CDC
